code: import React from'react';import{Link,useLocation}from'react-router-dom';import{Home,Database,FlaskConical,ClipboardList,Building}from'lucide-react';import{useClient}from'../contexts/ClientContext';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const NavBar=()=>{const location=useLocation();const{selectedClient}=useClient();const navItems=[{path:'/',label:'Home',icon:Home},{path:'/business',label:'Business Data',icon:Database},{path:'/project-overview',label:'Project Overview',icon:ClipboardList},{path:'/labs',label:'Action Labs',icon:FlaskConical}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("nav",{className:"sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white shadow-soft border-b border-gray-200",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"flex justify-between h-16",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"flex items-center",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"text-xl font-bold text-gray-900",children:"Finance Dashboard"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"flex items-center space-x-8",children:[navItems.map(_ref=>{let{path,label,icon:Icon}=_ref;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:path,className:"flex items-center px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors ".concat(location.pathname===path?'text-primary-600 bg-primary-50':'text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-50'),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Icon,{className:"w-4 h-4 mr-2"}),label]},path);}),selectedClient&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"flex items-center px-3 py-2 bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-md",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Building,{className:"w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 mr-2"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"text-sm font-medium text-blue-900",children:selectedClient.name})]})]})]})})});};export default NavBar;
